rag_rules: Fix unresolved references before adding AGREE clauses; remove invalid guarantee expressions with <error> type instead of extending architecture.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annexes; avoid referencing undefined identifiers like 'accDataOut' or 'event_in'.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, ensure all identifiers are properly resolved and typed before use.
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for output features or auxiliary variables only.
When diagnostics report type mismatches or unresolved references, trace back to the root cause and correct the reference or delete the invalid clause.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must have consistent types on both sides of binary operators.
AGREE annexes should only reference features or variables that are visible in the current scope.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE diagnostics; instead, fix or remove invalid clauses.
